novel_features.name: Niche Opportunity Score
novel_features.description: Score a keyword as a seller opportunity using eRank stats, difficulty, competition, and current top listings.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining multiple eRank Keyword Tool endpoints with local scoring and snapshot history.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs a go/no-go read on a keyword instead of separate raw metric calls.

novel_features.name: Top Listing Gap Analyzer
novel_features.description: Compare a draft listing title and tags against phrases and tags appearing in top eRank results.
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating top-listing tags, related searches, near matches, and user-supplied draft copy.
novel_features.example: erank-pp-cli listing gaps "dad mug" --title "Funny Dad Coffee Mug" --tags "dad gift,fathers day,mug" --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before publishing or rewriting an Etsy listing from keyword evidence.

novel_features.name: Tag Consensus Map
novel_features.description: Find tags that repeatedly appear across top listings, Etsy tag data, related searches, and near matches.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local aggregation across several eRank surfaces that the UI shows separately.
novel_features.example: erank-pp-cli tags consensus "dad mug" --source etsy --country USA --min-count 3 --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs defensible tag candidates grounded in multiple signals.

novel_features.name: Keyword Drift Watcher
novel_features.description: Detect meaningful changes in keyword competition, difficulty, and top listings across saved snapshots.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local historical snapshots; a single API call cannot show drift.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to monitor seasonal or competitive shifts without rereading full eRank pages.

novel_features.name: Keyword Portfolio Optimizer
novel_features.description: Rank saved keyword lists by weak, saturated, overlapping, and missing keyword opportunities.
novel_features.rationale: Requires combining saved keyword-list terms with live keyword metrics and local scoring.
novel_features.example: erank-pp-cli lists optimize "Father's Day mugs" --country USA --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs to clean up a seller's research list before drafting listings.

novel_features.name: Saturation Warning
novel_features.description: Flag crowded keywords by combining competition, difficulty, tag reuse, and top-listing density.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local scoring over multiple eRank signals rather than trusting one metric.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to avoid chasing keywords that look popular but are too crowded to enter.

novel_features.name: POD Angle Finder
novel_features.description: Extract product angles from related searches, near matches, tags, and current top listings.
novel_features.rationale: Requires evidence-backed clustering over eRank keyword and listing data.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs product-angle ideas tied to observed demand signals.

narrative.headline: Keyword Tool data from eRank, plus local scoring, drift, and listing-gap analysis for Etsy sellers.
narrative.value_prop: Use eRank from a terminal to capture keyword stats, top listings, tags, related searches, and keyword lists in agent-ready formats. The CLI adds opportunity scoring, drift detection, and listing-gap analysis on top of the captured Keyword Tool workflow.
narrative.auth_narrative: This CLI uses an authenticated eRank member session. Run the generated auth setup flow before live commands; captured endpoints require the same browser-compatible session that powers eRank's member tools.

quickstart.comment: Confirm eRank session setup and browser-compatible transport.

quickstart.command: erank-pp-cli keyword-tool list-top-listings --keyword "dad mug" --marketplace etsy --country USA --agent --select title,shop_name,price,tags
quickstart.comment: Pull a compact top-listing view for one Etsy keyword.
Convert raw eRank keyword signals into a seller decision score.

quickstart.command: erank-pp-cli tags consensus "dad mug" --source etsy --country USA --min-count 3 --agent
quickstart.comment: Find recurring tags backed by several eRank surfaces.

troubleshoots.symptom: Commands return login or empty member data.
troubleshoots.fix: Refresh the eRank browser session with the generated auth setup flow, then rerun `erank-pp-cli doctor`.
Run `erank-pp-cli quota list-daily --agent` and retry after quota resets if daily lookups are exhausted.

troubleshoots.symptom: POST keyword endpoints fail live verification.
troubleshoots.fix: Use `--dry-run` first; this capture has weak POST schema confidence from a single keyword workflow.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when you need repeatable eRank Keyword Tool research from an agent or script. It is strongest for Etsy keyword decisions, tag extraction, top-listing comparisons, and tracking changes over time.

recipes.title: Compact top listings for an agent
recipes.command: erank-pp-cli keyword-tool list-top-listings --keyword "dad mug" --marketplace etsy --country USA --agent --select title,shop_name,price,tags
recipes.explanation: Returns only listing fields an agent needs for comparison.

recipes.title: Score a niche before drafting
recipes.explanation: Combines eRank keyword and listing signals into a go/no-go score.

recipes.title: Find defensible tags
recipes.command: erank-pp-cli tags consensus "dad mug" --source etsy --country USA --min-count 3 --agent
recipes.explanation: Extracts recurring tag evidence across captured eRank surfaces.

recipes.title: Check draft listing gaps
recipes.command: erank-pp-cli listing gaps "dad mug" --title "Funny Dad Coffee Mug" --tags "dad gift,fathers day,mug" --agent
recipes.explanation: Compares draft copy to top-ranking listing evidence.
